CustomField.description: Editing the ‘Payable Amount’ automatically updates the Payable Line Amount allocations. Please review the payable line items allocations in order to make any edits
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Editing the ‘Payable Amount’ automatically updates the Payable Line Amount allocations. Please review the payable line items allocations in order to make any edits
CustomField.label: Payable Amount
